name: Bond
description: Bond — Embedded banking and financial API platform for building cards, accounts, and lending products into apps.

seo.title: Bond — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Bond: Bond — Embedded banking and financial API platform for building cards, accounts, and lending products into apps.

when_to_use: Embed branded debit cards into fintech consumer app
ACH account creation API for neobank product
Lending product integration for non-bank platform
Spend controls and card issuance for corporate fintech
BaaS API replacing core banking for startup

pros: Cards, accounts, lending under one API
cons: Company pivoted and sold to FIS in 2023
review.verdict: Post-FIS acquisition, Bond's original promise is murky—evaluate alternatives like Unit, Treasury Prime, or Stripe.
review.best_for: Existing Bond customers migrating under FIS ownership
review.not_for: New embedded-finance projects—choose a vendor with a clearer current roadmap

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
